narrative: Trump rejection of Iran peace proposal drives crude toward $100, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as the Strait of Hormuz remains closed; gold lower -0.96% near $4,685; equities +0.84%; DXY +0.08%; VIX 18.2. USD/JPY firms to 157.07 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists despite the fuel shock. NZD/USD retreats to 0.5948 on softer risk appetite following the failed deal. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27 for the next G8 policy catalyst.
